overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting colorful neon signage, futuristic architecture, and light traffic as the character moves from a narrow sidewalk across a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk between tall buildings with reflective wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark concrete facade with vertical neon light strips running along its surface
large red neon sign with 'KABUKI' lettering mounted on distant building
black and yellow bollards lining the curb between sidewalk and street
wet concrete pavement reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a character along a narrow downtown sidewalk at night. The left side is dominated by a tall concrete building wall with neon accents, while the right side features street bollards and a wet street. Neon signs illuminate the distant background, and sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening sidewalk approaching major intersection with traffic signals

events.description: sidewalk opens up as approaching intersection, traffic light pole and crosswalk become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the intersection, approaching the crosswalk signal and preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing red top walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall black pole with pedestrian signal box and walk indicator light
yellow striped crosswalk markings becoming visible at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk gradually widens as the character approaches a major intersection. The building wall on the left recedes, revealing more of the open plaza ahead. A traffic light pole with pedestrian signals comes into view, and the distinctive Kabuki neon sign grows larger on the right. The pavement remains wet and reflective under the neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow striped crosswalk and passing futuristic vehicles

events.description: white van drives through the intersection from right to left
yellow sports car speeds through the crosswalk from left to right

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the intersection while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection, crossing the pedestrian path
yellow sports car speeding through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped crosswalk markings covering the asphalt intersection
futuristic white delivery van with angular design passing through intersection
bright yellow futuristic sports car with black stripes speeding across the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide open intersection, stepping onto the distinctive yellow-striped crosswalk. A white van passes through the intersection followed by a yellow sports car, both featuring futuristic cyberpunk vehicle designs. The Kabuki neon sign now appears smaller in the distance as the camera moves deeper into the crossing, with wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban corridor into a wide, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow sidewalk flanked by a towering concrete wall with neon accents and a wet street lined with bollards. As the character advances, the sidewalk gradually widens and the building wall recedes, opening the view toward a plaza where a prominent Kabuki neon sign and pedestrian signals emerge. The scene then expands as the character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk, with the camera gliding across the reflective asphalt while futuristic white and yellow vehicles pass through the intersection. Finally, the perspective moves deeper into the crossing, leaving the Kabuki sign behind as the surrounding neon lights shimmer across the wet pavement.
